title: Immersive Hotbar
description: Adds animations to the hotbar to make it more immersive
body:
# Immersive Hotbar
This mod makes the static hotbar a lot more immersive by adding animations for placing blocks, picking up blocks, and using Tools and Weapons!


## ✨ Features

🔄 Animated hotbar slots when picking up, using, or swapping items

💬 Animated tooltip appears when switching items or hovering.

🎨 Bouncy/shrink animation styles configurable per user preference

✨ Animated XP Bar and Level up effects!

⚙️ Customizable via in-game config. 


[![YACL Required](https://files.catbox.moe/qhk3fk.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)


## 🧩 Compatibility
**[Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info)**, **[Bedrockify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockify)** and **[Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders)** are now supported as of 1.1.0!!


## ⚒️Forge Progress
### Currently supported:
- Neoforge 1.21.1, 1.21.9-1.21.11
### Planned:
- Forge support for 1.20.1
- Neoforge support for 1.21.2-1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.6-1.21.7
## Showcase
